name: ubi-reader

metadata.name: ubi-reader
metadata.summary: Extract files from UBI and UBIFS images.

documentation:
# UBI Reader
UBI Reader is a Python module and collection of scripts capable of extracting
the contents of UBI and UBIFS images, along with analyzing these images to
determine the parameter settings to recreate them using the mtd-utils tools.


### Known Issues
These are some known issues, that prevent an exact data dump from occuring.

* This does not replay the journal, so uncommited data will not be retrieved. Data can be in the journal with both clean and unclean shutdowns.

* Depending on how the NAND was dumped, the data bits may not be error corrected.

* Socket files will be ignored, you can change ubireader/settings.py to have it create dummy files in their place.


## Testing Branch
The testing branch includes a tools/ directory, that has scripts to help when trying to extract data from broken images. These also serve as examples of how to use parts of ubi_reader in custom scripts.

An override system is also included, for manually setting certain parameters that may be reported wrong by the UBI/FS data.

This branch will probably remain seperate, as it is meant to be customized to aid in extracting data from problematic images. You can install it with 'python setup.py develop' to make it easier to modify ubi_reader as needed.


## Installation:

Latest Version

    $ git clone https://github.com/jrspruitt/ubi_reader
    $ cd ubi_reader
    $ poetry install

Or

    $ pip install --user ubi_reader


## Usage:
For basic usage, the scripts need no options and if applicable will save output
to ./ubifs-root/. More advanced usage can set start and end offset, specify
an output directory, or for debugging can print out what it is doing to the
terminal.

Run program with -h or --help for explanation of options.

## Extracting File Contents:
    ubireader_extract_files [options] path/to/file

The script accepts a file with UBI or UBIFS data in it, so should work with a NAND
dump. It will search for the first occurance of UBI or UBIFS data and attempt to
extract the contents. If file includes special files, you will need to run as
root or sudo for it to create these files. With out it, it'll skip them and show a
warning that these files were not created.

## List/Copy Files:
    ubireader_list_files [options] path/to/file

The script accepts a file with UBI or UBIFS data in it, so should work with a NAND
dump. It will search for the first occurance of UBI or UBIFS data and treat it as
a UBIFS. To list files supply the path to list (-P, --path), e.g. "-P /" to list
the filesystems root directory. To copy a file from the filesystem to a local directory
supply the source path (-C, --copy) and the destination path (-D, --copy-dest),
e.g. -C /etc/passwd -D . (extract /etc/passwd from the UBIFS image and copy it to
local directory).

## Extracting Images:
    ubireader_extract_images [options] path/to/file

This script will extract the whole UBI or UBIFS image from a NAND dump, or the UBIFS
image from a UBI image. You can specify what type of image to extract by setting the
(-u, --image-type) option to "UBI" or "UBIFS". Default is "UBIFS".

## MTD-Utils Parameters:
    ubireader_utils_info [options] path/to/file

The script will analyze a UBI image and create a Linux shell script and UBI config
file that can be used for building new UBI images to the same specifications. For
just a printed list of the options and values, use the (-r, --show-only) option.

## Display Information:
    ubireader_display_info [options] path/to/file

Depending on the image type found, this script displays some UBI information along with
the header info from the layout block, including volume table records. If it is a UBIFS
image, the Super Node, and both Master Nodes are displayed. Using the (-u, --ubifs-info)
option, it will get the UBIFS info from inside a UBI file instead.

## Display Block Information:
    ubireader_display_blocks [options] "{'block.attr':?, ...}" path/to/file

Search for and display block information. This can be used for debugging failed image
and file extractions. The blocks are searched for using a double quoted Python Dict of
search paramaters, example. "{'peb_num':[0, 1] + range(100, 102), 'ec_hdr.ec': 1, 'is_valid': True}"
This will find PEBs 0, 1, 100, 101, 102, with an erase count of 1 that is a valid block.
Can use any of the parameters in ubireader.ubi.block.description.

## Options:
Some general option flags are
* -l, --log: This prints to screen actions being taken while running.
* -v, --verbose: This basically prints everything about anything happening.
* -p, --peb-size int: Specify PEB size of the UBI image, instead of having it guess.
* -e, --leb-size int: Specify LEB size of UBIFS image, instead of having it guess.
* -s, --start-offset int: Tell script to look for UBI/UBIFS data at given address.
* -n, --end-offset int: Tell script to ignore data after given address in data.
* -g, --guess-offset: Specify offset to start guessing where UBI data is in file. Useful for NAND dumps with false positives before image.
* -w, --warn-only-block-read-errors: Attempts to continue extracting files even with bad block reads. Some data will be missing or corrupted!
* -i, --ignore-block-header-errors: Forces unused and error containing blocks to be included and also displayed with log/verbose.
* -f, --u-boot-fix: Assume blocks with image_seq 0 are because of older U-boot implementations and include them. *This may cause issues with multiple UBI image files.
* -o, --output-dir path: Specify where files should be written to, instead of ubi_reader/output

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.UBI_CRC32_INIT
documentation: 0xFFFFFFFF

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.EC_HDR_FIELDS
documentation: EC header crc32 checksum.

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.UBI_VID_HDR_MAGIC
documentation: UBI!

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.VID_HDR_FIELDS
documentation: VID header CRC32 checksum.

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.VTBL_REC_FIELDS
documentation: Vol record CRC32 checksum.

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.UBI_VID_DYNAMIC
documentation: Volume can be resized.

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.UBI_VID_STATIC
documentation: Volume can not be resized.

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.UBI_COMPAT_DELETE
documentation: Delete this internal volume before anything written.

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.UBI_COMPAT_RO
documentation: Attach this device in read-only mode.

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.UBI_COMPAT_PRESERVE
documentation: Preserve this internal volume - touch nothing.

variables.name: ubireader.ubi.defines.UBI_COMPAT_REJECT
documentation: Reject this UBI image

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.volume.get_volumes
documentation:
Get a list of UBI volume objects from list of blocks

Arguments:
List:blocks            -- List of layout block objects
List:layout_info    -- Layout info (indexes of layout blocks and
                                    associated data blocks.)

Returns:
Dict -- Of Volume objects by volume name, including any
        relevant blocks.

classes.name: ubireader.ubi.volume.description
documentation:
UBI Volume object

Attributes:
Int:vol_id      -- Volume ID
Str:name    -- Name of volume.
Obj:vol_rec     -- Volume record object
Int:block_count -- Number of block associated with volume.

Methods:
display(tab)      -- Print Volume information
    Str:tab        -- (optional) '  ' to preface lines with.

get_blocks(blocks) -- Returns list of block objects tied to this volume

Volume object is basically a list of block indexes and some metadata
describing a volume found in a UBI image.

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.block.layout.group_pairs
documentation:
Sort a list of layout blocks into pairs

Arguments:
List:blocks        -- List of block objects
List:layout_blocks -- List of layout block indexes

Returns:
List -- Layout block pair indexes grouped in a list

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.block.layout.associate_blocks
documentation:
Group block indexes with appropriate layout pairs

Arguments:
List:blocks        -- List of block objects
List:layout_pairs  -- List of grouped layout blocks

Returns:
List -- Layout block pairs grouped with associated block ranges.

classes.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi_base

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi_base._get_file
documentation:
UBI File object

Returns:
Obj -- UBI File object.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi_base._get_block_count
documentation:
Total amount of UBI blocks in file.

Returns:
Int -- Number of blocks

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi_base._get_first_peb_num
documentation:
First Physical Erase Block with UBI data

Returns:
Int -- Number of the first PEB.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi_base._get_leb_size
documentation:
LEB size of UBI blocks in file.

Returns:
Int -- LEB Size.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi_base._get_peb_size
documentation:
PEB size of UBI blocks in file.

Returns:
Int -- PEB Size.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi_base._get_min_io_size
documentation:
Min I/O Size

Returns:
Int -- Min I/O Size.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi_base._get_blocks
documentation:
Main Dict of UBI Blocks

Passed around for lists of indexes to be made or to be returned
filtered through a list. So there isn't multiple copies of blocks,
as there can be thousands.

UBI Base object

Arguments:
Obj:image       -- UBI image object 

Attributes:
ubi_file:file      -- ubi_file object
Int:block_count    -- Number of blocks found.
Int:first_peb_num  -- Number of the first UBI PEB in file.
Int:leb_size       -- Size of Logical Erase Blocks.
Int:peb_size       -- Size of Physical Erase Blocks.
Int:min_io         -- Size of min I/O from vid_hdr_offset.
Dict:blocks        -- Dict keyed by PEB number of all blocks.

classes.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi._get_images
documentation:
Get UBI images.

Returns:
List -- Of volume objects groupled by image.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi._get_data_blocks_list
documentation:
Get all UBI blocks found in file that are data blocks.

Returns:
List -- List of block objects.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi._get_layout_blocks_list
documentation:
Get all UBI blocks found in file that are layout volume blocks.

Returns:
List -- List of block objects.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi._get_int_vol_blocks_list
documentation:
Get all UBI blocks found in file that are internal volume blocks.

Returns:
List -- List of block objects.

This does not include layout blocks.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi._get_unknown_blocks_list
documentation:
Get all UBI blocks found in file of unknown type..

Returns:
List -- List of block objects.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi.ubi.display
documentation:
Print information about this object.

Argument:
Str:tab    -- ' ' for spacing this object.

UBI object

Arguments:
Obj:ubi_file             -- UBI file object.

Attributes:
Inherits:ubi_base         -- ubi_base attributes.
List:images               -- List of UBI image objects.
List:data_blocks_list     -- List of all data blocks in file.
List:layout_blocks_list   -- List of all layout blocks in file.
List:int_vol_blocks_list  -- List of internal volumes minus layout.
List:unknown_blocks_list  -- List of blocks with unknown types. *

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.block.sort.by_image_seq
documentation:
Filter blocks to return only those associated with the provided image_seq number.
   If uboot_fix is set, associate blocks with an image_seq of 0 also.

Argument:
List:blocks       -- List of block objects to sort.
Int:image_seq    -- image_seq number found in ec_hdr.

Returns:
List        -- List of block indexes matching image_seq number.

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.block.sort.by_leb
documentation:
Sort blocks by Logical Erase Block number.

Arguments:
List:blocks -- List of block objects to sort.

Returns:
List              -- Indexes of blocks sorted by LEB.

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.block.sort.by_vol_id
documentation:
Sort blocks by volume id

Arguments:
Obj:blocks -- List of block objects.
List:slist     -- (optional) List of block indexes.

Return:
Dict -- blocks grouped in lists with dict key as volume id.

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.block.sort.by_type
documentation:
Sort blocks into layout, internal volume, data or unknown

Arguments:
Obj:blocks   -- List of block objects.
List:slist   -- (optional) List of block indexes.

Returns:
List:layout  -- List of block indexes of blocks containing the
                volume table records.
List:data    -- List of block indexes containing filesystem data.
List:int_vol -- List of block indexes  containing volume ids 
                greater than UBI_INTERNAL_VOL_START that are not
                layout volumes.
List:unknown -- List of block indexes of blocks that failed validation
                of crc in ed_hdr or vid_hdr.

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.block.get_blocks_in_list
documentation:
Retrieve block objects in list of indexes

Arguments:
List:blocks   -- List of block objects
List:idx_list -- List of block indexes

Returns:
Dict:blocks   -- List of block objects generated
                 from provided list of indexes in
                 order of idx_list.

functions.name: ubireader.ubi.block.extract_blocks
documentation:
Get a list of UBI block objects from file

Arguments:.
Obj:ubi    -- UBI object.

Returns:
Dict -- Of block objects keyed by PEB number.

classes.name: ubireader.ubi.block.description
documentation:
UBI Block description Object

UBI Specifications:
http://www.linux-mtd.infradead.org/  -- Home page
<kernel>/drivers/mtd/ubi/ubi-media.h -- Header structs
                                        and defines

Attributes:
Obj:ec_hdr           -- Error Count Header
Obj:vid_hdr          -- Volume ID Header
List:vtbl_recs       -- (Optional) List of Volume Table Records.
Bool:is_vtbl         -- If contains volume records table.
Bool:is_internal_vol -- If Vol ID is > UBI_INTERNAL_VOL_START
Bool:is_valid        -- If ec_hdr & vid_hdr are error free.
Int:peb_num          -- Physical Erase Block number.
Int:leb_num          -- Logical Erase Block number.
Int:file_offset      -- Address location in file of this block.
Int:size             -- Size of total block data or PEB size.
Int:data_crc         -- crc32 of block data.
Will print out all information when invoked as a string.

functions.name: ubireader.utils.guess_leb_size
documentation:
Get LEB size from superblock

Arguments:
Str:path    -- Path to file.

Returns:
Int         -- LEB size.

Searches file for superblock and retrieves leb size.

functions.name: ubireader.utils.guess_peb_size
documentation:
Determine the most likely block size

Arguments:
Str:path    -- Path to file.

Returns:
Int         -- PEB size.

Searches file for Magic Number, picks most 
    common length between them.

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_NODE_MAGIC
documentation: Set to LSB

documentation: LPT leaf node (contains LEB Properties)

documentation: LPT internal node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_LPT_LTAB
documentation: LPT's own lprops table

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_LPT_LSAVE
documentation: LPT's save table (big model only)

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_LPT_NODE_CNT
documentation: count of LPT node types

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_LPT_NOT_A_NODE
documentation: 4 bits of 1

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ITYPE_REG
documentation: Regular file

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ITYPE_DIR
documentation: Directory

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ITYPE_LNK
documentation: Soft link

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ITYPE_BLK
documentation: Block device node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ITYPE_CHR
documentation: Char device node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ITYPE_FIFO
documentation: FIFO

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ITYPE_SOCK
documentation: Socket

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ITYPES_CNT
documentation: Support file type count

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_KEY_HASH_R5
documentation: R5 hash

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_KEY_HASH_TEST
documentation: Test hash, returns first 4 bytes of name

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_INO_KEY
documentation: Inode node key

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_DATA_KEY
documentation: Data node key

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_DENT_KEY
documentation: Directory node key

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_XENT_KEY
documentation: Extended attribute entry key

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_KEY_TYPES_CNT
documentation: Supported key count

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_COMPR_FL
documentation: Use compression for this inode

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_SYNC_FL
documentation: Has to be synchronous I/O

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_IMMUTABLE_FL
documentation: Inode is immutable

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_APPEND_FL
documentation: Writes may only append data

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_DIRSYNC_FL
documentation: I/O on this directory inode must be synchronous

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_XATTR_FL
documentation: This inode is inode for extended attributes

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_COMPR_NONE
documentation: No compression

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_COMPR_LZO
documentation: LZO compression

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_COMPR_ZLIB
documentation: ZLIB compression

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_COMPR_ZSTD
documentation: ZSTD compression

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_COMPR_TYPES_CNT
documentation: Count of supported compression types

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_INO_NODE
documentation: Inode node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_DATA_NODE
documentation: Data node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_DENT_NODE
documentation: Directory entry node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_XENT_NODE
documentation: Extended attribute node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_TRUN_NODE
documentation: Truncation node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_PAD_NODE
documentation: Padding node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_SB_NODE
documentation: Superblock node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_MST_NODE
documentation: Master node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_REF_NODE
documentation: LEB reference node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_IDX_NODE
documentation: Index node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_CS_NODE
documentation: Commit start node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_ORPH_NODE
documentation: Orphan node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_AUTH_NODE
documentation: Authentication node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_SIG_NODE
documentation: Signature node

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_NODE_TYPES_CNT
documentation: Count of supported node types

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_MST_DIRTY
documentation: Rebooted uncleanly

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_MST_NO_ORPHS
documentation: No orphans present

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_MST_RCVRY

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_NO_NODE_GROUP
documentation: This node is not part of a group

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_IN_NODE_GROUP

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_LAST_OF_NODE_GROUP

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_FLG_BIGLPT
documentation: If 'big' LPT model is used if set.

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_FLG_SPACE_FIXUP
documentation: First-mount 'fixup' of free space within.

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_FLG_DOUBLE_HASH
documentation: Store 32bit cookie for 64bit support.

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_FLG_ENCRYPTION
documentation: If filesystem contains encrypted files.

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_FLG_AUTHENTICATION
documentation: If contains hashes for authentication.

variables.name: ubireader.ubifs.defines.UBIFS_PAD_NODE_FIELDS
documentation: Number of bytes after this inode unused.

classes.name: ubireader.ubifs.nodes.common_hdr
documentation:
Get common header at given LEB number + offset.

Arguments:
Bin:buf     -- Raw data to extract header information from.

See ubifs/defines.py for object attributes.

classes.name: ubireader.ubifs.nodes.ino_node
documentation:
Get inode node at given LEB number + offset.

Arguments:
Bin:buf     -- Raw data to extract header information from.

See ubifs/defines.py for object attributes.

classes.name: ubireader.ubifs.nodes.dent_node
documentation:
Get dir entry node at given LEB number + offset.

Arguments:
Bin:buf     -- Raw data to extract header information from.

See ubifs/defines.py for object attributes.

classes.name: ubireader.ubifs.nodes.data_node
documentation:
Get data node at given LEB number + offset.

Arguments:
Bin:buf     -- Raw data to extract header information from.
Int:offset  -- Offset in LEB of data node.

See ubifs/defines.py for object attributes.

classes.name: ubireader.ubifs.nodes.idx_node
documentation:
Get index node at given LEB number + offset.

Arguments:
Bin:buf     -- Raw data to extract header information from.

See ubifs/defines.py for object attributes.

classes.name: ubireader.ubifs.nodes.branch
documentation:
Create branch from given idx_node data buf.

Arguments:
Bin:buf     -- Raw data to extract header information from.

classes.name: ubireader.ubifs.nodes.sb_node
documentation:
Get superblock node at given LEB number + offset.

Arguments:
Bin:buf     -- Raw data to extract header information from.
Int:offset  -- Offset in LEB of data node.

See ubifs/defines.py for object attributes.

classes.name: ubireader.ubifs.nodes.mst_node
documentation:
Get master node at given LEB number + offset.

Arguments:
Bin:buf     -- Raw data to extract header information from.
Int:offset  -- Offset in LEB of data node.

See ubifs/defines.py for object attributes.

methods.name: ubireader.ubifs.ubifs.display
documentation:
Print information about this object.

Argument:
Str:tab    -- ' ' for spacing this object.

UBIFS object

Arguments:
Str:path           -- File path to UBIFS image. 

Attributes:
Obj:file           -- File object
Int:leb_size       -- Size of Logical Erase Blocks.
Int:min_io         -- Size of min I/O from vid_hdr_offset.
Obj:sb_node        -- Superblock node of UBIFS image LEB0
Obj:mst_node       -- Master Node of UBIFS image LEB1
Obj:mst_node2      -- Master Node 2 of UBIFS image LEB2

functions.name: ubireader.ubifs.misc.parse_key
documentation:
Parse node key

Arguments:
Str:key    -- Hex string literal of node key.

Returns:
Int:key_type   -- Type of key, data, ino, dent, etc.
Int:ino_num    -- Inode number.
Int:khash      -- Key hash.

functions.name: ubireader.ubifs.misc.decompress
documentation:
Decompress data.

Arguments:
Int:ctype    -- Compression type LZO, ZLIB (*currently unused*).
Int:unc_len  -- Uncompressed data lenth.
Str:data     -- Data to be uncompessed.

Returns:
Uncompressed Data.

functions.name: ubireader.ubifs.walk.index
documentation:
Walk the index gathering Inode, Dir Entry, and File nodes.

Arguments:
Obj:ubifs    -- UBIFS object.
Int:lnum     -- Logical erase block number.
Int:offset   -- Offset in logical erase block.
Dict:inodes  -- Dict of ino/dent/file nodes keyed to inode number.

Returns:
Dict:inodes  -- Dict of ino/dent/file nodes keyed to inode number.
    'ino'    -- Inode node.
    'data'   -- List of data nodes if present.
    'dent'   -- List of directory entry nodes if present.

classes.name: ubireader.ubi_io.ubi_file

methods.name: ubireader.ubi_io.ubi_file.read_block
documentation:
Read complete PEB data from file.

Argument:
Obj:block -- Block data is desired for.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi_io.ubi_file.read_block_data
documentation:
Read LEB data from file

Argument:
Obj:block -- Block data is desired for.

UBI image file object

Arguments:
Str:path         -- Path to file to parse
Int:block_size   -- Erase block size of NAND in bytes.
Int:start_offset -- (optional) Where to start looking in the file for
                    UBI data.
Int:end_offset   -- (optional) Where to stop looking in the file.

Methods:
seek            -- Put file head to specified byte offset.
    Int:offset
read            -- Read specified bytes from file handle.
    Int:size
tell            -- Returns byte offset of current file location.
read_block      -- Returns complete PEB data of provided block
                   description.
    Obj:block
read_block_data -- Returns LEB data only from provided block.
    Obj:block
reader          -- Generator that returns data from file.
reset           -- Reset file position to start_offset.
is_valid        -- If the object intialized okay.

Handles all the actual file interactions, read, seek,
extract blocks, etc.

methods.name: ubireader.ubi_io.leb_virtual_file.last_read_addr
documentation: Start address of last physical file read
